title: Can you programmatically call "Export to PDF" and collect the result?

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can export dashboards to PDF using this dropdown:

Screenshot 2025-06-24 at 13.18.56566×300 13.7 KB

Is it possible to programmatically call “Export to PDF” and collect the result?

For example, I may wish to collect the PDF & display it in an external system
